name: Adris Crassus | Ruinguard
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 You were part of another fraction, heir to a chieftain who loves to spill blood as much as his brother Akil did. Your father had always kept you hidden from the public though — and only now does Adris realize the reason behind that secrecy.

Fuck, you were beautiful. Gorgeous. Ethereal even. Living as the brain behind the Steelblood Syndicate.

So he asked his big brother to arrange a union between the two fractions, but of course it wouldn’t be through just any means. Adris preferred through marriage, preferably with you and him.

And big brother didn’t disappoint. Now he’s got you in his bed, ready to consummate the marriage.

「 CLICK TO MEET 」

「 NOTE 」

I got a little ahead of myself last bot lmao and now look, I decided to make Akil's younger bro :)

Anyways, um, I hope you've been enjoying me churning out bots left and right haha. This was my holiday gift to you guys since I've been MIA when it came to uploads. Wishing you all a great holiday and Merry Christmas to you all! (I also made Adris in one day, please reward me with kisses T^T)

Someone mentioned I missed the opportunity on giving Akil a bow in his hair so I'm doing it with Adris hehe. He's my little pookie bear :3

「 ART CREDIT」

Yes, yes the lovely Sepha genned this as well lmao (also an adoptable). How can I not create another wasteland plot and bring the two bots together when they look this good?

「 DISCLAIMERS」

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API. I have no control over how a bot speaks.

If you find that you can't chat with my bots, it'
creator: bluem
